raw_consumer_statement: I noticed reoccurring charges on my statement XX/XX/year>, the credit card due date ; that had been happening for a few months unnoticed. I disputed XXXX systems for the months of XXXX and XXXX {$21.00} each month. Live plan for {$40.00} each month. Legal zoom charges for XXXX each month. These charges were disputed multiple times, and each denied. I locked my card, requested a new on for fraud in XXXX XXXX XXXX  and still charges unauthorized were charged to my account in XXXX XXXX XXXX. I've only disputed three months of these charges however looking back thru the year the charges started XX/XX/year>, with XXXX at {$20.00} then continued with 5 more charges last one being XX/XX/year>, after the disputes and no longer using that card. Live plan total for 2023 {$200.00}, after the first charge XX/XX/year>, the amount taken from my card doubled to 40 XXXX XXXX XXXX  charges began XX/XX/year>, at XXXX and proceeded to charge my card XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX and XX/XX/XXXX  again after disputes were placed and a lock should have been on the card. XXXX XXXX  charges totaling {$120.00}. XXXX XXXX has been used by us prior we bought something in bulk and paid three charges of over XXXX $ for a specific need, however they had continued to charge us an unauthorized fee monthly for {$49.00} with no services requested starting XX/XX/year>, and continued in XXXX at {$49.00} and again XXXX XXXX XXXX  at {$49.00}. those charges seemed to stop after the dispute however my funds were never returned totaling {$140.00}. {$470.00} After the disputes i went on and paid for the purchases I authorized while waiting the period thru the disputes which they failed me as a consumer to investigate and handle properly. especially allowing for new charges to come onto my account when I'm disputing these companies. the failed to do a proper investigation and communicate with myself findings or even stopping them from charging me more. I don't not pay my credit cards my credit speaks for itself. however, I will not work hard to pay for anything I don't use or I haven't authorized. i choose larger companies to keep my business with for better protection from the world we live in today with scams and such on a rise.
